reasoning: I will describe a concise approach to retrieve a length from the format string by reading a leading integer starting at the current offset (formatOff). If digits are found, they form the length; if no digits exist, the function returns 1 as the default repeat/count. If advance is true, the internal offset (formatOff) is moved to after the parsed digits; otherwise formatOff remains unchanged. This handles either a repeat count or a string length specification, defaulting to 1 when unspecified.
